prompt: Create a dark cinematic full-body portrait of a young female jiangshi standing centered in an ancient Chinese ancestral hall at night. She has an ethereal porcelain-pale face, large melancholy eyes, subtle red eye makeup, straight black bangs, and extremely long loose black hair falling past her waist. She wears a traditional Qing dynasty-inspired jiangshi outfit: a deep navy-black robe with wide layered sleeves, gold trim, ornate embroidered wave patterns at the cuffs and hem, a square chest panel embroidered with a white crane, vertical gold frog-button closures down the front, black embroidered shoes, and a long pearl prayer-bead necklace with a red tassel. On her head is a black-and-red Qing official hat with a small gold finial, and a yellow talisman paper hangs over the center of her forehead with red Chinese calligraphy. Her hands are folded calmly in front of her body, expression still and haunting. The environment is a shadowy temple interior with wet reflective stone flooring, old wooden pillars, a large dim lantern overhead, two vertical hanging calligraphy banners in the background, one small floor lantern glowing at lower left, an altar or candle stand at lower right, drifting blue ghost flames and low mist around her. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, symmetrical framing, gothic Chinese fantasy atmosphere, muted blue-black palette with warm amber lantern highlights, highly detailed fabric embroidery, realistic-anime dark fantasy rendering, soft volumetric light, shallow depth of field, no modern objects, no extra characters, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a dark cinematic full-body portrait of a young female jiangshi standing centered in an ancient Chinese ancestral hall at night. She has an ethereal porcelain-pale face, large melancholy eyes, subtle red eye makeup, straight black bangs, and extremely long loose black hair falling past her waist. She wears a traditional Qing dynasty-inspired jiangshi outfit: a deep navy-black robe with wide layered sleeves, gold trim, ornate embroidered wave patterns at the cuffs and hem, a square chest panel embroidered with a white crane, vertical gold frog-button closures down the front, black embroidered shoes, and a long pearl prayer-bead necklace with a red tassel. On her head is a black-and-red Qing official hat with a small gold finial, and a yellow talisman paper hangs over the center of her forehead with red Chinese calligraphy. Her hands are folded calmly in front of her body, expression still and haunting. The environment is a shadowy temple interior with wet reflective stone flooring, old wooden pillars, a large dim lantern overhead, two vertical hanging calligraphy banners in the background, one small floor lantern glowing at lower left, an altar or candle stand at lower right, drifting blue ghost flames and low mist around her. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, symmetrical framing, gothic Chinese fantasy atmosphere, muted blue-black palette with warm amber lantern highlights, highly detailed fabric embroidery, realistic-anime dark fantasy rendering, soft volumetric light, shallow depth of field, no modern objects, no extra characters, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张暗黑电影感的全身肖像，主角为 一位年轻的僵尸少女，她正站在夜晚中国古老祠堂的中央。她拥有如瓷器般苍白空灵的面容、忧郁的大眼睛、精致的红色眼妆、整齐的黑色刘海，以及垂至腰间的超长 黑色长发。她身着清代风格的传统僵尸服饰：深藏青色长袍，配有宽大的叠层袖口、金色镶边、袖口和下摆绣有华丽的波浪纹，胸前饰有绣着白鹤的方形补子，前襟带有垂直的金色盘扣，脚穿黑色绣花鞋，颈间佩戴着带有红色流苏的珍珠念珠长项链。头上戴着一顶黑红相间的清代官帽，帽顶有小金珠装饰，额头正中贴着一张写有红色汉字的黄色符咒。她双手平静地交叠在身前，神情静谧而诡异。环境为阴森的寺庙内部，地面是潮湿且带有倒影的石板，立着古老的木柱，上方悬挂着一盏昏暗的大灯笼，背景有两幅垂直悬挂的书法条幅，左下方有一盏微光的地灯，右下方有祭坛或烛台，周围漂浮着蓝色的鬼火与低矮的薄雾。采用 9:16 竖构图，对称式构图，哥特式中国奇幻氛围，以暗蓝色和黑色为主色调，点缀温暖的琥珀色灯光，展现高精度的织物刺绣细节，写实动漫暗黑奇幻渲染风格，柔和的体积光，浅景深，无现代物品，无额外角色，无水印。
